inputs.label: Outer Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Pipe outer diameter in millimeters. Standard sizes: 21.3mm to 219.1mm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pipe outer diameter in millimeters. Standard sizes: 21.3mm to 219.1mm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boru dış çapı milimetre cinsinden. Standart boyutlar: 21,3 mm - 219,1 mm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rohraußendurchmesser in Millimetern. Standardgrößen: 21,3 mm bis 219,1 mm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre extérieur du tuyau en millimètres. Tailles standard : 21,3 mm à 219,1 mm.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro exterior de la tubería en milímetros. Tamaños estándar: 21,3 mm a 219,1 mm.

inputs.label: Wall Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Wall thickness in millimeters. Varies by schedule.

businessContext_i18n.en: Wall thickness in millimeters. Varies by schedule.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milimetre cinsinden et kalınlığı. Schedule'a göre değişir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wandstärke in Millimetern. Variiert je nach Schedule.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur de paroi en millimètres. Varie selon le schedule.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor de pared en milímetros. Varía según el calendario.

inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Pipe length in meters. Commonly 6m or 12m.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pipe length in meters. Commonly 6m or 12m.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metre cinsinden boru uzunluğu. Genellikle 6 m veya 12 m.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rohrlänge in Metern. Üblich sind 6 m oder 12 m.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur du tuyau en mètres. Généralement 6 m ou 12 m.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de la tubería en metros. Comúnmente 6 m o 12 m.

inputs.label: Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Material density in kg/m³. Steel: 7850, aluminum: 2700, PVC: 1400.

businessContext_i18n.en: Material density in kg/m³. Steel: 7850, aluminum: 2700, PVC: 1400.
businessContext_i18n.tr: kg/m³ cinsinden malzeme yoğunluğu. Çelik: 7850, alüminyum: 2700, PVC: 1400.
businessContext_i18n.de: Materialdichte in kg/m³. Stahl: 7850, Aluminium: 2700, PVC: 1400.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du matériau en kg/m³. Acier : 7850, aluminium : 2700, PVC : 1400.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del material en kg/m³. Acero: 7850, aluminio: 2700, PVC: 1400.

formulas.weight: Math.PI * wallThickness * (outerDiameter - wallThickness) * density * length * quantity / 1e6

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
